description: Improve perceived responsiveness by making all interactions feel instant and snappy. Optimize micro-interactions across all components for sub-100ms feedback.

userStories.title: Faster Animation Tokens
userStories.description: As a user, I want interactions to feel instant so the UI doesn't feel sluggish.
acceptanceCriteria: Add instant: 50 and quick: 100 to duration tokens
Update default transitions to use faster timings
Add snappy easing curve for micro-interactions

userStories.title: Button Micro-interactions
userStories.description: As a user, I want buttons to respond immediately when I hover or click them.
acceptanceCriteria: Click/active state shows instant scale feedback
Focus ring appears immediately on keyboard navigation
Add subtle brightness shift on hover

userStories.title: Input Focus States
userStories.description: As a user, I want form inputs to clearly indicate when they're focused.
acceptanceCriteria: Border glow appears smoothly on focus

userStories.title: Card Hover Effects
userStories.description: As a user, I want cards to subtly respond when I hover over them.

userStories.title: Toggle/Switch Animations
userStories.description: As a user, I want toggles to feel responsive and satisfying.
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle thumb moves with spring physics
Color transition is smooth but quick

userStories.title: Select/Dropdown Transitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want dropdowns to open and close smoothly but quickly.

userStories.title: Modal Transitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want modals to appear and disappear without delay.

userStories.title: Toast Notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want toast notifications to slide in smoothly.
acceptanceCriteria: Toast enters with quick slide + fade

userStories.title: Skeleton Loading States
userStories.description: As a user, I want skeleton loaders to feel alive, not frozen.
acceptanceCriteria: Transition to real content is seamless
No jarring flash when content loads

userStories.title: Tooltip Appearance
userStories.description: As a user, I want tooltips to appear quickly without delay.
acceptanceCriteria: Fade-in is quick but not jarring

userStories.title: Tab Switching
userStories.description: As a user, I want tab switching to feel instantaneous.
acceptanceCriteria: Active indicator moves with spring physics
Content swap has no perceptible delay
Hover state on tabs is instant

userStories.title: Sidebar Transitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want sidebar expand/collapse to be smooth.

nonGoals: No new visual design changes (colors, spacing)
